ideation: This animation sequence will depict a robot reacting to the "no bicycles" sign, conveying a sense of understanding and compliance.  The animation will focus on a head shake and a slight lowering of the arms. The robot understands that it cannot ride a bicycle and is indicating this understanding. Frame 1 shows the robot in a neutral position, slightly attentive. Frame 2 showcases the beginning of a head shake, with a subtle lowering of both arms. Frame 3 shows the peak of the head shake, and arms are fully lowered, indicating compliance. Frame 4 returns to the neutral position, showing the robot's acceptance of the rule. Frame 5 shows the robot's return to a neutral, relaxed position, indicating the end of the reaction.

frames.beat: robot stands alert, ready to receive information
arms lower slightly, a subtle head shake begins
arms fully lowered, head shakes in firm denial
arms lift slightly, acknowledging the rule
robot returns to a relaxed, compliant stance
